title: The Companies (Donations to National Funds) Act, 1951
full_text: The Companies (Donations to National Funds) Act, 1951 कंपनी (राष्‍ट्रीय निधि दान) अधिनियम,1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-54 Act Number: 54 Enactment Date: 1951-10-17 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Companies (Donations to National Funds) Act, 1951 Hindi Title: कंपनी (राष्‍ट्रीय निधि दान) अधिनियम,1951 Long Title: An Act to enable companies to make donations to national funds.
